data.name: Sextans
data.effects:
Agile and cunning Doll, formerly under the Orlog Corporation, was abandoned after a failed mission, suffering severe mental damage. She was subsequently rescued by the ELMO and became reliable companions.

"Compared to my former colleagues, the Dolls around you seem somewhat... naive."

skills.name: Dreamscape Garrote
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 1 tile, dealing melee physical damage equal to 80% of attack to them.

skills.name: Requiem
skills.description:
Damage dealt by all Dolls wielding blades is increased by 10%.

Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 1 tile (If multiple conditions are met, this effect will only apply once).

When an enemy unit dies or is in Stability Break, gain 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When allied units (excluding Sextans) attacks with a blade, consume 1 point of Confectance Index to use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

At the start of the action, if Confectance Index is not full, restore Confectance Index to max.

At the end of action, applies [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] to all enemy units standing on Electric tiles.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Damage dealt by all Dolls wielding blades is increased by 10%.

Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 2 tiles (If multiple conditions are met, this effect will only apply once) and can move through tiles occupied by enemies.

When an enemy unit dies or is in Stability Break, gain 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When allied units (excluding Sextans) attacks with a blade, consume 1 point of Confectance Index to use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

At the start of the action, if Confectance Index is not full, restore Confectance Index to max.

At the end of action, applies [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] to all enemy units standing on Electric tiles.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of battle, gain 5 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

Damage dealt by all Dolls wielding blades is increased by 10%.

Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 2 tiles (If multiple conditions are met, this effect will only apply once) and can move through tiles occupied by enemies.

When an enemy unit dies or is in Stability Break, gain 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When allied units (excluding Sextans) attacks with a blade, use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

At the start of the action, if Confectance Index is not full, restore Confectance Index to max. When the user's Confectance Index is full, melee damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 15%.

At the end of action, applies [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] to all enemy units standing on Electric tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 2 tiles and can move through tiles occupied by enemies.

[effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] effect is enhanced: Attack, healing, and critical damage is increased by same amount of critical rate overflow, up to a maximum of 45%.

[effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] effect is enhanced: For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], the damage multiplier of this effect is increased by 4%.

[effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] effect is enhanced: Melee damage taken is increased by 10%, up to a maximum of 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
At the start of battle, gain 5 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. The maximum critical rate of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] is increased to 75%.

The damage multiplier of [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is increased to 90% and ignores 30% of the target's defense. No longer consumes Confectance Index to use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

When the user's Confectance Index is full, melee damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 15%.

skills.name: Sanctuary Lauds
skills.description:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, and applies [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49].

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increases the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 90% of attack for all allied units within the area.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24].

skills.name: Death Knell
skills.description:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 90% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 1 debuff.

After this skill used and if the enemy target is afflicted with [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49], this skill deals 1 additional instance of melee Electric damage equal to the damage multiplier of this skill.

Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] and removes the target's [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 90% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 1 debuff.

After this skill used and if the enemy target is afflicted with [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49], this skill deals 1 additional instance of melee Electric damage equal to the damage multiplier of this skill.

Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] and removes the target's [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 120% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 2 debuffs.

After this skill used and if the enemy target is afflicted with [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49], this skill deals 1 additional instance of melee Electric damage equal to the damage multiplier of this skill.

Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Damage and healing multipliers are increased by 30% and 1 additional debuff is cleansed.

[effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] is no longer removed.

skills.name: Midnight Vesper
skills.description:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 3 tiles wide, applying [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] to them and generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Before this skill resolves, applies [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy targets within the affected area, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide, applying [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] to them and generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Before this skill resolves, applies [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy targets within the affected area, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide, applying [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] to them and generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Before this skill resolves, applies [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy targets within the affected area, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] and [effect:0aebdc30-c7a2-41ff-bdea-d80d2e53563a] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24]. Also gains [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Increase width by 2 tiles.

[effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] effect is enhanced: Stability damage dealt is increased by 5 points and ignores 5 points of the target's stability index. When dealing Electric damage or melee damage, increased damage by 5% for each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] held by Sextans. (If multiple conditions are met, then this effect will only count once).

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Before attacking, applies [effect:0aebdc30-c7a2-41ff-bdea-d80d2e53563a] to all allied units for 2 turns. After attacking, gain [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0] for 2 turns.

keys.effect: Melee damage dealt is increased by 10%.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - Stigmata in the Palm

keys.effect: At the start of battle, for each Electric attributed Dolls and dolls using a blade on the battlefield, Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. (If multiple conditions are met, it will only apply once).
Before an allied unit with [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] makes an active attack, Sextans applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the targeted enemy for 2 turns.
Before performing [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e], cleanses 1 buffs from the target.
Damage dealt to enemy units in Stability Break is increased by 7%.
After an allied unit (excluding Sextans) attacks with a blade, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target.
Increase stability damage dealt by all allied units by 1 point.

vertebrae.effect: When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

doll.name: Sextans
doll.effects:
Agile and cunning Doll, formerly under the Orlog Corporation, was abandoned after a failed mission, suffering severe mental damage. She was subsequently rescued by the ELMO and became reliable companions.

"Compared to my former colleagues, the Dolls around you seem somewhat... naive."

Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 1 tile (If multiple conditions are met, this effect will only apply once).

When allied units (excluding Sextans) attacks with a blade, consume 1 point of Confectance Index to use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

At the start of the action, if Confectance Index is not full, restore Confectance Index to max.

At the end of action, applies [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] to all enemy units standing on Electric tiles.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2:
Damage dealt by all Dolls wielding blades is increased by 10%.

Mobility of all Electric attributed Dolls or dolls using a blade is increased by 2 tiles (If multiple conditions are met, this effect will only apply once) and can move through tiles occupied by enemies.

When an enemy unit dies or is in Stability Break, gain 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

vertebrae.effect: Before attacking, applies [effect:0aebdc30-c7a2-41ff-bdea-d80d2e53563a] to all allied units for 2 turns. After attacking, gain [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0] for 2 turns.

doll.name: Sextans
doll.effects:
Agile and cunning Doll, formerly under the Orlog Corporation, was abandoned after a failed mission, suffering severe mental damage. She was subsequently rescued by the ELMO and became reliable companions.

"Compared to my former colleagues, the Dolls around you seem somewhat... naive."

skillsLevel3.name: Midnight Vesper
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 3 tiles wide, applying [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] to them and generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Before this skill resolves, applies [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy targets within the affected area, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets in a path 5 tiles wide, applying [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] to them and generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Before this skill resolves, applies [effect:1b73d68b-f004-4994-811a-53434c7d20f2] to all enemy targets within the affected area, lasting for 2 turns.

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24].

Applies [effect:20a97062-b9a0-4811-a2d2-c31ca74e56c7] and [effect:0aebdc30-c7a2-41ff-bdea-d80d2e53563a] to all allied units on the field, lasting for 2 turns.

After the attack, Sextans gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and can use the active skill [dollSkill:673e7715-ac3f-45dc-be63-085b579fbe24]. Also gains [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0] for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
Damage and healing multipliers are increased by 30% and 1 additional debuff is cleansed.

[effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49] is no longer removed.

doll.name: Sextans
doll.effects:
Agile and cunning Doll, formerly under the Orlog Corporation, was abandoned after a failed mission, suffering severe mental damage. She was subsequently rescued by the ELMO and became reliable companions.

"Compared to my former colleagues, the Dolls around you seem somewhat... naive."

skillsLevel3.name: Death Knell
skillsLevel3.description:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 90% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 1 debuff.

After this skill used and if the enemy target is afflicted with [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49], this skill deals 1 additional instance of melee Electric damage equal to the damage multiplier of this skill.

Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] and removes the target's [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd], increase the damage multiplier by 10%.

Recovers HP equal to 90% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 1 debuff.

Sextans gains 1 stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] and removes the target's [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49]. For each [effect:19da2200-941d-4e8e-b145-19363a9dafd8] of the target, gain 1 additional stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Select one direction, dealing AoE melee Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units in a 3x9 tile area of the selected direction, generate [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 3 turns.

Recovers HP equal to 120% of attack to all allied units within the area and cleanse 2 debuffs.

After this skill used and if the enemy target is afflicted with [effect:ff9c2a71-343e-4c4b-8aae-35796a69ca49], this skill deals 1 additional instance of melee Electric damage equal to the damage multiplier of this skill.

When the skill hits an enemy target, [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is triggered and gain 1 point of Confectance Index. After using the skill, Sextans gains 2 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd].

vertebrae.effect:
At the start of battle, gain 5 stacks of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd]. The maximum critical rate of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] is increased to 75%.

The damage multiplier of [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e] is increased to 90% and ignores 30% of the target's defense. No longer consumes Confectance Index to use [effect:f89cf3a4-1f2a-4dd3-9e50-263f876d2d9e].

When the user's Confectance Index is full, melee damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 15%.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Electric damage dealt by this unit, Electric damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Applies [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] to 3 enemy units with [effect:6c4e95e3-e6c0-443e-aef1-392b1677d5a2] or standing on Electric tiles, dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack.

For each stack of [effect:7accd3cd-1adb-48ae-bb6b-5c8faa8db5fd] held by Sextans, increase the damage multiplier of this effect by 3%.

If this effect is triggered multiple times within a round, decrease the damage multiplier of this effect by 20%, down to a minimum of 30%.

","upgrades":[{"id":"10f241c3-6f66-4a9f-bb9a-1add40863464","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

Sextans' exclusive effect. This is removed when the effect applier dies. Cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

This is considered an Electric buff and cannot be cleansed.

Removed upon the applicant's death. This is considered an Electric buff and cannot be cleansed.
